qa_pairs.question: Why might new Security Groups be necessary when migrating virtual machine instances to the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: New Security Groups (OpenStack’s firewall rules) may be required because the floating IP address range in the New Arbutus Cloud is different than the Legacy Arbutus Cloud.

qa_pairs.question: Who is responsible for backing up critical data during the migration process for Arbutus Cloud instances?
qa_pairs.answer: Project owners are responsible for creating backups which may be necessary for your migration, as the Arbutus Cloud Team does not make backups or copies of instances.
